metadata.title: Generate a sales offer prompt for compliance evidence collection tailored to an enterprise compliance lead in Latin America, using the sovereign lens to ensure regulatory alignment and audit readiness.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a sales offer prompt for compliance evidence collection tailored to an enterprise compliance lead in Latin America, using the sovereign lens to ensure regulatory alignment and audit readiness.
mission.success_definition: Artifact is a valid sales_offer_prompt for compliance evidence.; All SR8-required sections are present and compilable.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.; Output is ready for Codex runtime execution.

in_scope.item: The prompt must address high-urgency, low-context scenarios with missing details, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Artifact is a valid sales_offer_prompt for compliance evidence.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All SR8-required sections are present and compilable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Output is ready for Codex runtime execution.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.offer_goal: Generate a sales offer prompt for compliance evidence collection tailored to an enterprise compliance lead in Latin America, using the sovereign lens to ensure regulatory alignment and audit readiness.

pain_points.item: The prompt must address high-urgency, low-context scenarios with missing details, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.

SRXML_Artifact.value_proposition: The prompt must address high-urgency, low-context scenarios with missing details, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.

proof_policy.item: Must use sovereign_lens framework for Latin American compliance (e.g., LGPD, local data sovereignty).
Must handle incomplete or ambiguous input without hallucinating missing data.
Must produce a structured artifact with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.
Must include validation gates (e.g., compliance check, evidence completeness, audit trail).

conversion_path.item: sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and sections

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
